fullText: security hotspots let you know that you are using security sensitive apis and that you should review your code to make sure it is safe in this example i've created a pull request and after analysis sonar cube lets me know that there are security hotspots i need to review before i merge this code in sonarcube i see a queue of all the security hotspots in need of review and after review of this code i've determined it's safe and mark it as such sonarcube automatically updates the status on my pull request to let me know that this code is ready to merge
